comment: Phase 1 complete. .env format errors twice, schoology cache bug missed in tests, plist missing despite spec claiming it existed.

Phase 2 + briefing chat tail complete. Haiku JSON non-compliance required 3 separate passes. max_tokens bumped incrementally instead of set correctly upfront. Adjustment loop fix was reactive, not proactive. Unscheduled GCal filter caught in live test not pre-build.
